title: Additional Escrow Deposit. If during the application for the renewal of
content: 29 license, the LMA has pending recruitment violation case/s, an additional escrow deposit 30 of Seventy-Five Thousand Pesos (Php75,000.00) per case shall be required. 31 32 If in the succeeding renewal, the LMA had decreased its pending cases, the Department 33 shall allow the withdrawal of the corresponding additional escrow deposit. 34 35
